# HalfPace TaxGPT

> India's AI Tax Expert — a free chat assistant for Indian taxation and compliance. Answers questions on Income Tax, GST, TDS, Accounting, ROC & MCA, Trademark, LLP & Company Registration, MSME, Startup India, Professional Tax, Bookkeeping and Payroll, in English, Hindi, Urdu and Hinglish.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Start a conversation with HalfPace TaxGPT and explore example questions.
- [About](/about): What HalfPace TaxGPT is, what it covers, and how it works.
- [Tax Calculators](/calculators): Planned suite of Indian tax calculators.
- [Latest Tax Updates](/updates): Curated tax and compliance updates (coming soon).
- [Contact](/contact): How to reach the HalfPace team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How HalfPace TaxGPT handles user data.
- [Terms of Use](/terms): Terms governing use of the service.
